title: hieracium pseudauricula
intro: Hieracium pseudauricula is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, known for its bright yellow flowers and edible leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The leaves of Hieracium pseudauricula contain flavonoids and other compounds that have been shown to have antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects, providing potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Hieracium pseudauricula can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves can be added to salads or used as a cooking green.
